### Why America Needs Fewer Bus Stops: A Transit Efficiency Analysis

* American buses are significantly slower than European counterparts, averaging only 8 mph in cities like NYC and San Francisco
* US bus stops are spaced 700-800 feet apart (8 stops/mile in major cities) vs. European spacing of 1,300 feet (4 stops/mile)
* Frequent stops waste 20% of bus travel time on acceleration, deceleration, and passenger boarding
* "Stop balancing" (reducing stop frequency) can increase bus speeds by 4-14% with minimal infrastructure investment
* Fewer stops allow transit agencies to invest more in quality amenities like shelters, seating, and real-time information at each location
* Case studies show impressive results: San Francisco increased speeds 14%, Vancouver saved passengers 5-10 minutes per trip
* Counterintuitively, fewer stops can increase network access by enabling buses to reach more destinations within the same timeframe
* This low-cost solution addresses speed, reliability, and operating costs without requiring new infrastructure or political battles over street space

### 美国需要减少公交站点:提升公交效率分析

* 美国公交车速度明显慢于欧洲,纽约和旧金山等城市平均时速仅8英里
* 美国站点间距700-800英尺(主要城市每英里8站),而欧洲间距1300英尺(每英里4站)
* 频繁停靠浪费20%行程时间用于加减速和乘客上下车
* "站点平衡"(减少站点频率)可将公交速度提升4-14%,基础设施投资极少
* 站点减少使公交机构能为每个站点投入更多资金,改善候车亭、座椅和实时信息等设施
* 案例研究显示显著成效:旧金山速度提升14%,温哥华为乘客节省5-10分钟
* 看似矛盾的是,站点减少反而能增加网络可达性,使公交在相同时间内到达更多目的地
* 这一低成本方案可改善速度、可靠性和运营成本,无需新基础设施或街道空间的政治争议

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://worksinprogress.co/issue/the-united-states-needs-fewer-bus-stops/)**

### The Misuses of the University: A Critical Look at Johns Hopkins

* A history professor observes Johns Hopkins University's 150th anniversary through a lens of institutional critique and disillusionment
* The university has invested hundreds of millions in ostentatious buildings (SNF Agora Institute, new student center) while facing classroom shortages and budget constraints
* Extravagant architecture symbolizes "Airport Sublime"—placeless global capital rather than educational mission
* Campus diversity plummeted from 37% to 17.6% underrepresented minorities following legal restrictions on affirmative action
* The university lost $800 million in federal USAID funding in 2025, laying off thousands globally and shuttering public health programs
* Faculty generate $4.8 billion in research funding but lack governance power, while donors and private equity trustees make strategic decisions
* Convocation ceremonies feature corporate-style platitudes and bucket hats while administrators discipline students protesting Gaza
* A 2001 arts center costing $17 million was demolished after just two decades to make way for a $250+ million replacement
* The piece critiques the corporatization of higher education and misalignment between stated values and institutional priorities

### 大学的误用:对约翰霍普金斯大学的批判性审视

* 一位历史教授通过制度批判和幻灭的视角观察约翰霍普金斯大学150周年校庆
* 该大学在华丽建筑上投资数亿美元(SNF Agora研究所、新学生中心),同时面临教室短缺和预算限制
* 奢华建筑象征着"机场崇高"——无根的全球资本而非教育使命
* 受平权行动法律限制影响,校园少数族裔多样性从37%暴跌至17.6%
* 2025年该大学失去8亿美元联邦USAID资金,在全球裁员数千人并关闭发展中国家公共卫生项目
* 教师创造48亿美元研究经费却缺乏治理权力,而捐赠者和私募股权受托人制定战略决策
* 开学典礼充斥企业式陈词滥调和桶帽,管理层惩戒抗议加沙问题的学生
* 2001年耗资1700万美元的艺术中心仅使用二十年就被拆除,为耗资2.5亿美元以上的替代建筑让路
* 文章批判高等教育的企业化以及既定价值观与机构优先事项之间的错位

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://www.publicbooks.org/the-misuses-of-the-university/)**


## 🔥 GitHub Trending / GitHub 热门项目

### Scrapling - Adaptive Web Scraping Framework for Modern Websites

* A comprehensive Python web scraping framework that scales from single requests to full-scale concurrent crawls with intelligent element tracking that adapts to website changes
* Adaptive parser automatically relocates elements when pages update, multiple fetcher types (HTTP, dynamic browser automation, stealth mode), built-in Cloudflare Turnstile bypass, Scrapy-like spider API with pause/resume functionality, streaming mode with real-time stats, automatic proxy rotation, and multi-session support
* Trending with 1,828 stars today because it solves the biggest pain points in web scraping: handling anti-bot systems out of the box, surviving website redesigns through adaptive parsing, and providing a unified interface that works for both simple scripts and enterprise-scale crawls. The "one library, zero compromises" approach combines the simplicity of requests with the power of Scrapy and the stealth of browser automation.

### Scrapling - 适应性网页抓取框架

* 功能介绍:一个全面的 Python 网页抓取框架,可从单个请求扩展到大规模并发爬取,具有智能元素跟踪功能,能够适应网站变化
* 主要特点:自适应解析器在页面更新时自动重新定位元素,多种抓取器类型(HTTP、动态浏览器自动化、隐身模式),内置 Cloudflare Turnstile 绕过,类似 Scrapy 的爬虫 API 支持暂停/恢复,流式模式提供实时统计,自动代理轮换,多会话支持
* 为何值得关注:今日获得 1,828 星标,因为它解决了网页抓取中最大的痛点:开箱即用地处理反爬虫系统,通过自适应解析在网站重新设计后仍能正常工作,提供统一接口适用于简单脚本和企业级爬取。"一个库,零妥协"的理念将 requests 的简洁性、Scrapy 的强大功能和浏览器自动化的隐身能力完美结合。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/D4Vinci/Scrapling)**

### Hugging Face Skills - Standardized AI/ML Task Definitions for Coding Agents

* **What it does**: Provides a collection of pre-packaged, self-contained "skills" that define AI/ML workflows like dataset creation, model training, evaluation, and paper publishing. Each skill is a folder containing instructions, scripts, and resources that coding agents (Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor) can automatically load and execute.

* **Key features**: 
  - Universal compatibility across major coding agent platforms using the Agent Skills standard format
  - 9 ready-to-use skills covering Gradio UI building, Hugging Face CLI operations, dataset management, model training/evaluation, job scheduling, experiment tracking, and research paper publishing
  - Simple installation via plugin commands or directory symlinks
  - Each skill packages YAML frontmatter metadata with markdown instructions and helper scripts
  - Extensible framework for creating custom skills with validation tooling

* **Why it's notable**: Bridges the gap between AI coding agents and ML workflows by standardizing how agents understand and execute complex ML tasks. With 1,538 stars today, it's gaining traction as a practical solution for making coding agents more effective at ML engineering tasks, particularly within the Hugging Face ecosystem. The cross-platform compatibility and structured approach to agent instructions addresses a real pain point in the emerging coding agent space.

---

### Hugging Face Skills - 为编码代理提供标准化的 AI/ML 任务定义

* **功能介绍**: 提供一系列预打包的、自包含的"技能"集合,定义了数据集创建、模型训练、评估和论文发布等 AI/ML 工作流。每个技能都是一个包含指令、脚本和资源的文件夹,编码代理(Claude Code、OpenAI Codex、Gemini CLI、Cursor)可以自动加载和执行。

* **主要特点**:
  - 使用 Agent Skills 标准格式,兼容所有主流编码代理平台
  - 提供 9 个即用型技能,涵盖 Gradio UI 构建、Hugging Face CLI 操作、数据集管理、模型训练/评估、作业调度、实验跟踪和研究论文发布
  - 通过插件命令或目录符号链接简单安装
  - 每个技能将 YAML 前置元数据与 Markdown 指令和辅助脚本打包在一起
  - 可扩展框架,支持使用验证工具创建自定义技能

* **为何值得关注**: 通过标准化代理理解和执行复杂 ML 任务的方式,在 AI 编码代理和 ML 工作流之间架起桥梁。今日获得 1,538 星标,作为提升编码代理在 ML 工程任务(特别是 Hugging Face 生态系统内)效能的实用解决方案而备受关注。跨平台兼容性和结构化的代理指令方法解决了新兴编码代理领域的实际痛点。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/huggingface/skills)**

### GitNexus - Code Intelligence Engine for AI Agents

* Transforms any codebase into a knowledge graph that maps dependencies, call chains, clusters, and execution flows—giving AI agents complete architectural context to avoid missing code relationships
* Dual-mode operation: CLI + MCP server for production development (integrates with Cursor, Claude Code, Windsurf, OpenCode) or browser-based Web UI for quick exploration without installation
* Exposes 7 MCP tools (hybrid search, symbol context, impact analysis, change detection, coordinated rename, Cypher queries) plus resources for clusters/processes and auto-installs agent skills for exploring, debugging, and refactoring

### GitNexus - AI 代理的代码智能引擎

* 将任何代码库转换为知识图谱,映射依赖关系、调用链、集群和执行流程——为 AI 代理提供完整的架构上下文,避免遗漏代码关系
* 双模式运行:CLI + MCP 服务器用于生产开发(集成 Cursor、Claude Code、Windsurf、OpenCode),或基于浏览器的 Web UI 用于快速探索无需安装
* 提供 7 个 MCP 工具(混合搜索、符号上下文、影响分析、变更检测、协调重命名、Cypher 查询)以及集群/流程资源,并自动安装用于探索、调试和重构的代理技能

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus)**


## 🚀 Fast-Moving Repos / 快速崛起项目

### vinext - Next.js API reimplemented on Vite for flexible deployment

* **What it does**: A Vite plugin that recreates the entire Next.js API surface (routing, SSR, RSC, CLI) so existing Next.js apps can run on Vite's toolchain instead of Next.js's compiler. Supports both Pages Router and App Router with deployment to Cloudflare Workers.

* **Key features**: One-command migration (`vinext init`) that's non-destructive; AI-assisted migration via Agent Skills; 94% Next.js API compatibility; fast Vite HMR; comprehensive CLI (`dev`, `build`, `deploy`); 1,700+ unit tests and 380+ E2E tests; supports React Server Components via `@vitejs/plugin-rsc`.

* **Why it's notable**: An ambitious AI-driven experiment (most code written by Claude) that challenges whether a major framework's API can be replicated on different infrastructure. Offers escape velocity from Vercel's platform with Cloudflare Workers deployment (zero cold starts, global edge). Demonstrates how far AI-assisted development can go in rebuilding complex systems. Still experimental but functional enough for exploration and demos.

---

### vinext - 基于 Vite 重新实现的 Next.js API,支持灵活部署

* **功能介绍**: 一个 Vite 插件,完整重建了 Next.js 的 API 表面(路由、SSR、RSC、CLI),让现有 Next.js 应用可以运行在 Vite 工具链上而非 Next.js 编译器。同时支持 Pages Router 和 App Router,可部署到 Cloudflare Workers。

* **主要特点**: 一键迁移命令(`vinext init`)且不破坏原项目;支持 AI 辅助迁移(Agent Skills);94% Next.js API 兼容性;快速的 Vite HMR;完整 CLI 工具(`dev`、`build`、`deploy`);1700+ 单元测试和 380+ E2E 测试;通过 `@vitejs/plugin-rsc` 支持 React 服务器组件。

* **为何值得关注**: 一个雄心勃勃的 AI 驱动实验(大部分代码由 Claude 编写),挑战在不同基础设施上复刻主流框架 API 的可能性。提供脱离 Vercel 平台的方案,可部署到 Cloudflare Workers(零冷启动、全球边缘节点)。展示了 AI 辅助开发在重建复杂系统方面的潜力。虽仍处于实验阶段,但已足够用于探索和演示。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/cloudflare/vinext)**

### OpenPlanter - Recursive AI Investigation Agent for Data Analysis

* What it does: An autonomous AI agent that ingests heterogeneous datasets (corporate registries, campaign finance, lobbying records, government contracts) and surfaces non-obvious connections through recursive analysis and entity resolution across multiple data sources.

* Key features: Terminal UI with 19 specialized tools including file I/O, shell execution, web search via Exa, and recursive sub-agent delegation; supports multiple LLM providers (OpenAI GPT-5.2, Anthropic Claude Opus 4-6, OpenRouter, Cerebras, local Ollama models); headless mode for CI/CD; session persistence and resumption; configurable recursion depth and reasoning effort levels.

* Why it's notable: Tackles investigative journalism and compliance research workflows by autonomously decomposing complex cross-dataset investigations into parallelized sub-tasks with evidence-backed verification—essentially a specialized AI agent for uncovering hidden relationships in public records and financial data.

---

### OpenPlanter - 递归式 AI 调查代理,用于数据分析

* 功能介绍: 一个自主运行的 AI 代理,可摄取异构数据集(企业注册信息、竞选财务、游说披露、政府合同等),通过递归分析和跨数据源实体解析,揭示非显而易见的关联关系。

* 主要特点: 终端 UI 配备 19 种专用工具,包括文件读写、Shell 执行、Exa 网络搜索和递归子代理委派;支持多种大语言模型提供商(OpenAI GPT-5.2、Anthropic Claude Opus 4-6、OpenRouter、Cerebras、本地 Ollama 模型);无头模式适配 CI/CD;会话持久化与恢复;可配置递归深度和推理强度级别。

* 为何值得关注: 专为调查性新闻和合规研究工作流设计,能自主将复杂的跨数据集调查分解为并行化子任务并进行证据验证——本质上是一个专门用于在公共记录和财务数据中发现隐藏关系的 AI 代理工具。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/ShinMegamiBoson/OpenPlanter)**

### 🎬 Why AI Needs a Trillion Words to Do What Humans Do Easily - Dario Amodei

**Channel:** Dwarkesh Patel

* What the video covers: An in-depth discussion with Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei exploring the fundamental differences between human and AI learning, examining why large language models require massive amounts of training data to achieve capabilities that humans develop naturally with far less input.

* Key topics discussed: The data efficiency gap between human and artificial intelligence, the architectural and algorithmic reasons behind AI's need for trillion-token training datasets, insights into how human brains process and generalize information compared to neural networks, and implications for future AI development and scaling laws.

* Why it's worth watching: This conversation offers rare insights from one of AI's leading researchers into the core challenges of machine learning. Understanding why AI systems are so data-hungry compared to humans is crucial for anyone interested in the limitations and future trajectory of AI technology. Amodei's perspective provides both technical depth and accessible explanations of one of AI's most fundamental puzzles.

---

### 🎬 为什么AI需要万亿词汇才能做到人类轻松完成的事 - Dario Amodei

**频道:** Dwarkesh Patel

* 视频内容概述: 与Anthropic首席执行官Dario Amodei的深度对话,探讨人类学习与AI学习之间的根本差异,研究为什么大型语言模型需要海量训练数据才能获得人类用少量输入就能自然发展的能力。

* 主要话题: 人类智能与人工智能之间的数据效率差距、AI需要万亿级token训练数据集背后的架构和算法原因、人脑处理和泛化信息的方式与神经网络的对比,以及对未来AI发展和扩展定律的影响。

* 为何值得观看: 这次对话提供了来自AI领域顶尖研究者的罕见洞察,揭示了机器学习的核心挑战。理解为什么AI系统相比人类如此依赖数据,对于任何关注AI技术局限性和未来发展轨迹的人都至关重要。Amodei的观点既有技术深度,又能通俗易懂地解释AI最根本的谜题之一。

### 🎬 TCP vs UDP #programming #protocols
**Channel:** Навчальний Порт

* What the video covers: A comparison between TCP (Transmission Control Protocol) and UDP (User Datagram Protocol), two fundamental networking protocols used in internet communication
* Key topics discussed: The differences in how TCP and UDP handle data transmission, reliability, connection establishment, and their respective use cases in programming and network applications
* Why it's worth watching: Essential knowledge for developers working with network programming, understanding when to use each protocol can significantly impact application performance and reliability

### 🎬 TCP vs UDP #programming #protocols
**频道:** Навчальний Порт

* 视频内容概述: 对比TCP(传输控制协议)和UDP(用户数据报协议)这两种互联网通信中的基础网络协议
* 主要话题: TCP和UDP在数据传输、可靠性、连接建立方面的差异,以及它们在编程和网络应用中的各自使用场景
* 为何值得观看: 对于从事网络编程的开发者来说是必备知识,了解何时使用每种协议能够显著影响应用程序的性能和可靠性

**[Watch Video / 观看视频](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cVJRxBXgts8)**
